title: An unexpectedly robust and simple strategy that helped me reach 488K.
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
I consistently adhere to a relatively conservative strategy, which has enabled me to achieve sustained profitability. The core philosophy of this strategy is quite simple: through a combination of position sizing, diversification, trend following, and fundamental analysis, I prudently select high-quality individual stocks or ETFs. This approach not only helps me effectively weather the impact of severe market volatility but also allows me to precisely capture growth opportunities.

If you are interested in learning more about my approachYou can send me a private message.I am happy to share my investment strategy with you free of charge. However, I cannot guarantee whether or not it will be suitable for your specific circumstances; I simply hope that you will consider it as a rational reference point.

comments.author: DesperateReading656
comments.body: I'm very interested in your investment approach, could you send me a copy?

comments.author: sheeburashka
comments.body:
Tech sector was a straight shot up over past 30 days. Did your robust approach have anything to do with XLK or QQQ or MU, etc.?

If so, I wouldn’t read too much into recent success.

replies.author: Independent_Gur8648
replies.body: that definitely helped, not gonna pretend market strength didn’t matter. just trying to take advantage when momentum is there and stay cautious when it’s not

comments.author: prepuscular
comments.body: Everyone’s a genius in a bull market

comments.author: angusslq
comments.body: Qqq 3 months return is around 18%. Your simple strategy is not outperforming buy and hold strategy. Any plan to modify your strategy?
